_comment: Annual Rate Constants — 2026. Federal civilian retirement, tax, and benefits data. All values are government-published public data. No PII. Update annually each January from OPM, IRS, SSA, and CMS sources. VA compensation and VGLI data moved to federal/veterans-affairs/.
_corrected: 2026-03-08: 32+ corrections applied (IRA, IRMAA, deductions, TSP threshold, DIC). Tax bracket middle cutoffs (12%/22%/24%/32%/35%) corrected per IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-32 Tables 1 and 3. All values verified against IRS Notice 2025-67, CMS CMS-8089-N, TSP Bulletin 25-3, VA.gov.

tsp._comment: Thrift Savings Plan contribution limits (IRC §402(g) and SECURE 2.0)
tsp._catchup_note: SECURE 2.0: catch-up for ages 60-63 is higher limit. If prior-year FICA wages > $150,000 (increased from $145k in 2025), catch-up MUST be Roth. Source: TSP Bulletin 25-3.
tsp._match_note: Agency auto 1% + full match achieved at 5% employee contribution. Agency contributions are ALWAYS Traditional.

pay._hourly_note: OPM statutory divisor — 2,087 hours. Never changes. Hourly = Annual Salary / 2087.
pay._sick_leave_note: 2,087 / 12 = 173.917 hours/month (OPM rounds to 174). Full months only — fractional days dropped.

fers._enhanced_note: 1.1% applies ONLY if age 62+ AND 20+ years of service at retirement. Absolute ceiling.
fers._sc_note: Special Category (LEO/FF/ATC): 1.7% x first 20 SC years + 1.0% x years beyond 20. 1.1% enhancement does NOT apply.
fers._survivor_note: Full survivor annuity = 50% of unreduced annuity. Partial = 25%. CSRS full = 55% — do not confuse.
fers._survivor_cost_note: Full election reduces retiree annuity by 10%. Partial by 5%.

cola_formula._note: FERS COLA is NOT full CPI. CSRS gets full CPI — FERS does not. Applying full CPI overstates FERS retirement income.

irmaa._comment: IRMAA income thresholds for Medicare Part B/D surcharges — 2026. Based on 2024 MAGI. VA compensation is EXCLUDED from IRMAA calculation. Source: CMS CMS-8089-N (Nov 14, 2025).

ira._comment: IRA contribution limits — 2026. Source: IRS Notice 2025-67 (Nov 13, 2025). Contributions require earned income. FERS annuity, SS, TSP withdrawals, and VA comp do NOT qualify as earned income.
ira._catchup_note: IRA catch-up now indexed for inflation under SECURE 2.0. Increased from $1,000 to $1,100 for 2026.

social_security._fra_note: FRA varies by birth year — see static_refs.json for full table

bend_points._comment: PIA formula bend points for 2026 eligibility cohort (born 1964). Source: ssa.gov/oact/cola/bendpoints.html

social_security._early_claim_note: 5/9 of 1% per month for first 36 months before FRA; 5/12 of 1% beyond 36 months
social_security._delayed_note: 8% per year beyond FRA, up to age 70
social_security.windfall_elimination_note: WEP may apply to federal workers with non-covered pension. Implemented separately.

earnings_test._comment: Social Security Retirement Earnings Test — 2026. Source: ssa.gov/oact/cola/rtea.html

year_of_fra.reduction: $1 withheld per $3 over limit (months before FRA only)

social_security._wage_base_note: Also in ss-taxable-max.json with full history. Included here for projection convenience.

planning_assumption_defaults._comment: Common planning assumption baselines for projection engines. Consumer applications may allow user override. Not government-published figures.
planning_assumption_defaults._cola_note: FERS 1.0%, SS 2.5%, VA 2.0%, Healthcare 5.0%. Inflation default 2.5%.
planning_assumption_defaults._healthcare_note: Medicare Part B premiums have grown ~5.8% annually over 25 years. 5.0% is a conservative planning baseline.
planning_assumption_defaults._inflation_note: 2.5% aligns with SSA Trustees intermediate assumption. Prior value was 3.0%.

tax._comment: Federal income tax constants for projection engines — 2026. Source: IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-32 (includes OBBBA adjustments signed July 4, 2025).

senior_deduction_obbba._note: OBBBA temporary deduction. Available whether itemizing or not. Separate from standard deduction and additional 65+ deduction. Expires after 2028 tax year.

tax._rmd_note: SECURE 2.0: RMD age = 73 for those turning 72 after Dec 31, 2022. Age 75 begins 2033.
tax._brackets_single_note: Verified against IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-32 Table 1 (Section 4.01). All cutoffs confirmed.
tax._brackets_mfj_note: Verified against IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-32 Table 3 (Section 4.01). All cutoffs confirmed.
